title: Jerusalem Artichoke Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, featuring roasted Jerusalem artichokes and a blend of Mexican flavors.
instructions: 2. Scrub the Jerusalem artichokes clean and chop them into 1-inch pieces.
3. Place the artichoke pieces on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of avocado oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Roast the artichokes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
6. While the artichokes are roasting, grill the onion over medium heat until caramelized.
7. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
8. Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of roasted artichoke onto a warmed tortilla, topping with grilled onion, a sprinkle of cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
